case_title: HONG SANG MARKET, INC. VS. MING POULTRY, INC. A.K.A. MING'S POULTRY, INC., ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HONG SANG MARKET, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MING POULTRY, INC. A.K.A. MING'S POULTRY, INC., AND DOES I TO X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
